calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for Ralph Pico, Administrator; Adriano Hrvatin for Anthony Pico, Petitioner.

Mr. O'Keeffe stated that the $240.00 creditors claim was satisfied, presented proof of payment to the Court and stated that the money was placed in a non interest bearing account. Ms. Hrvatin stated that there was no objection by Anthony Pico. The Court will add the $500.00 surcharge to the tax reserve. Mr. O'Keeffe will prepare a revised Order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Continued To Mar-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for Ralph Pico (Petitioner). Adriano Hrvatin for Anthony Pico (Petitioner).

Mr. O'Keeffe reported that mediation had been successful, that the settlement agreement had been prepared but needed to be more detailed. Mr. O'Keeffe will file the petition for Final Distribution which will include approval for the settlement agreement. The matter was continued to March 19, 2008 for status on the petition for final distribution.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Continued To Feb-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Gregory O'keeffe appearing for and with Ralph Pico. Richard Kinyon and Adriano Hrvatin appearing for petitioners.
The Court was informed that the parties had not tried mediation. Mr. Hrvatin expresses that he feels that the matter can be mediated and requested mediation. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation which is to be completed by 12/18/2007. The matter was continued to 01/08/2008 for status on mediation. If mediation is not successful, a hearing date will be set.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Continued To Sep-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
